reviews.comment:
En mi recorrido a la ciudad de Corrientes nos acostumbramos a parar en todas las YPF y para nuestra sorpresa recibimos una atención maravillosa en la YPF de Formosa en la Rotonda de La Virgen ... Una hermosa joven nos atendió como si fuéramos su familia ...mis felicitaciones a la Empresa por tener un personal excelente como es Priscila ... saluditos

(Translated by Google)
On my trip to the city of Corrientes, we get used to stopping at every YPF station, and to our surprise, we received wonderful service at the YPF in Formosa at the Rotonda de La Virgen roundabout. A lovely young woman served us as if we were family. My congratulations to the company for having such excellent staff as Priscila. Best wishes!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13088641644358785510/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s5WU1Vb3RhV2xzZVhKVFYyWXlaVTVmUVhSa1ZuYxAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio, soy un cliente transitorio Sastifecho, por la atención, que nos dieron principalmente una señorita de nombre Priscila, quien con su amabilidad y respeto nos hiso sentir como si estuviéramos en nuestra casa...Excelente personal tiene la YPF Formosa ya saliendo de la ciudad. Es nuestra parada principal en. Nuestro paso por el vecino país...

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. I'm a satisfied customer, especially thanks to the attention we received from a young lady named Priscila, whose kindness and respect made us feel right at home. The YPF station in Formosa, just outside the city, has excellent staff. It's our main stop on our trip through the neighboring country.
